note: Per hot-path benchmark, calibration-normalised work units (`units` = mean ns / the calibration loop's mean ns) plus the raw mean ns for reference. The gate (`deno task perf:gate`) compares units-to-units so it is hardware-independent, and fails a benchmark only when its units exceed slowdownFactor x the baseline — a coarse, noise-tolerant guard for order-of-magnitude regressions. Re-baseline deliberately (`deno task perf:baseline`) and note it in CHANGELOG.md.
